patch.value: Root cause: summarizeResult() in src/core/telemetry/runtime.ts caps arrays at 5 samples and objects at 25 keys, but nested item data within samples is unbounded. list-all with 636 items produces events that trigger Cloudflare error 1010 (HTTP 403). Queue grows to 130MB+ with entries stuck at 70+ retry attempts. Fix options: (1) cap result_summary total byte size, (2) truncate sample values, (3) add max payload size guard before enqueue.
Issue: Telemetry queue bloat from oversized result_summary payloads

Telemetry events with capture_level=max include result_summary for list-all commands that can be 3-5MB per event, exceeding Cloudflare body size limits and causing queue bloat with exponential backoff retries.
result_summary payloads are bounded; queue bloat is prevented; existing oversized entries are pruned
Run pm list-all with 600+ items and capture_level=max; observe telemetry queue entry >3MB; observe Cloudflare rejecting flush with HTTP 403 error 1010
Cap result_summary byte size or truncate nested sample values in summarizeResult()
Telemetry events stay under 1MB regardless of command output size
list-all events reach 5MB and get rejected by Cloudflare WAF

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: Evidence: 190 queue entries totaling 130MB. 59 entries over 1MB. Largest entry 5MB. Old entries have 70+ retry attempts with max backoff. Endpoint returns HTTP 403 with error code 1010 for large payloads.

value.note: summarizeResult function needs payload size cap

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: Fixed: Added TELEMETRY_MAX_EVENT_BYTES (512KB) pre-enqueue size guard that truncates result_summary for oversized events. Added TELEMETRY_SANITIZE_MAX_DEPTH (6) and TELEMETRY_SANITIZE_MAX_ARRAY_ITEMS (20) to bound nested value recursion. Added TELEMETRY_MAX_QUEUE_ENTRY_ATTEMPTS (15) to prune entries that have failed too many times. All 1087 tests pass.

author: audit-agent

patch.value: Fixed with pre-enqueue size guard, depth-limited sanitization, and max-attempts pruning. Build passes, all 1087 tests pass.

message: Close telemetry issue with fix evidence
